headline: US 🇺🇸 & Iran 🤝 'SO CLOSE' but 'NOT YET' Vance 😏 Spills ☕
text: JD Vance 🕴️🧢 tells BBC 🎙️ the US 🇺🇸 and Iran 🇮🇷 are 'VERY CLOSE' 😮 but still 'NOT THERE YET' 🤏 on a 60-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION 📅🕊️ that would kick off talks on Iran's NUCLEAR PROGRAM ☢️🔬! Officials spilled the tea ☕ that the FRAMEWORK was already agreed pending the GOAT Trump 🍊👑 and Iran's leadership seal of approval ✅ but Tasnim News 📰 said 'HOLD UP' 🚫 deal NOT FINALIZED or CONFIRMED 😬. Vance spilled more ☕ negotiators are 'GOING BACK AND FORTH' 🎢 on 'LANGUAGE POINTS' 🗣️ including the 'QUESTION OF ENRICHMENT' ⚛️🍹 and US demands Iran STOP making HIGHLY ENRICHED URANIUM 🛑☢️ and DUMP its stockpile before it can be weaponized 💣. He stayed OPTIMISTIC 😌 saying Iran was negotiating in 'GOOD FAITH' 🙏 but warned 'OPTION B' 💥 a return to COMBAT OPS 🪖 is still on the table 🪑. The deal would also OPEN the STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚢🛤️ allow 'UNRESTRICTED' passage 🚀 clear mines in 30 days 🧹 and let Iran RESUME selling oil 🛢️💰 after the US lifts its BLOCKADE and hands out SANCTION WAIVERS 🎟️. Trump 🍊 was BRIEFED but didn't sign off yet 🖊️ saying he needs a couple days to mull it over 🤔. Iranian state media dropped a 14-POINT MEMO DRAFT 📜 that included lifting the naval blockade 🛳️ pulling US forces from Iran's 'vicinity' 📍 and handing control of the Strait to Iran and Oman 🇮🇷🇴🇲 but the White House called it a 'COMPLETE FABRICATION' 🤡. Meanwhile both sides are accusing each other of CEASEFIRE VIOLATIONS 🚨 with Iran claiming it shot down a US drone 🛩️💥 and US Central Command clapping back 'NO AIRCRAFT LOST' ✈️✅. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent 🏦🧔 warned 'DON'T GET AHEAD OF THE PRESIDENT' 🚫👑 and joked we gotta 'GET TO THE DEAL BEFORE THE OTHER SIDE' 🏁. One-fifth of the world's LNG and oil normally floats through Hormuz 🛢️🌍 so closure hits global fuel trade like a gut punch 💥⛽. Gulf allies, Dems, and some GOP are piling on the pressure for Trump to END THE WAR 🕊️💨 while he keeps hinting a deal is NEAR yet no SUBSTANTIVE RESULTS yet 😩. Negotiations remain FLUID like a slip-n-slide 🛝 and both sides keep contradicting each other 🗣️🤷‍♂️ raising fresh questions about how close they REALLY are to PEACE 🕊️ or if we'll see ROUND 2 💥. Stay tuned the TEA is still piping hot ☕🔥!
